name: MSP Recovery Inc. Warrant
summary: MSP Recovery Inc. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock of MSP Recovery Inc. MSP Recovery Inc. operates as a data analytics company focusing on recovering improper healthcare payments, leveraging their proprietary data assets to identify and pursue claims related to Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial insurance overpayments. The company seeks to recover funds for its clients, including government entities and healthcare providers.
